name: io.github.hyperd-ai/hyperd-mcp
description: MCP server for hyperD — 20 paid DeFi endpoints (wallet risk, token security, cross-protocol liquidation health across Aave V3 / Compound v3 / Spark / Morpho, P&L, DEX quote aggregation, governance LLM summaries, sentiment, anomaly, audit, multi-call bundle). Pay-per-call in USDC on Base via x402 — no API key, no signup. The signed EIP-3009 payment is the auth, settles in ~2 seconds via Coinbase facilitator.

environmentVariables.name: HYPERD_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed 32-byte EVM private key for the wallet that pays for hyperD calls in USDC on Base. The wallet must hold USDC (~$5 is plenty for hundreds of decision cycles). The MCP server signs EIP-3009 transfer authorizations per call.
